home.title: ANAQIO — AI Fashion Studio | Coming Soon
home.description: ANAQIO is an AI-powered fashion studio for the Moroccan luxury market. Generate lookbooks, swap backgrounds, adjust lighting, and produce cinematic fashion videos. Launching 2026.

about.desc: Anaqio is an AI-powered visual studio for fashion commerce, built in Casablanca by designers and engineers passionate about elevating the Moroccan fashion industry.

hero.label: ANAQIO · AI Visual Studio
hero.title: Fashion, Reimagined.
hero.desc: The AI-powered visual studio giving Moroccan fashion brands the infrastructure to produce studio-quality imagery — without a studio.
hero.imageAlt: Fashion model showcasing Anaqio studio-quality imagery

problem.title: The broken studio pipeline.
problem.desc: Every fashion shoot in Morocco means renting a space, booking models, coordinating lighting, post-processing hundreds of RAW files — and then doing it all again next season. The result: brands that move slowly, spend heavily, and still end up with imagery that looks like everyone else's.

skus.label: of SKUs, one shoot can't cover them all

solution.title: One workspace. Infinite looks.
solution.desc: Upload your garments — models or brand assets. Anaqio generates studio-quality imagery in minutes — not weeks.

upload.desc: Drop in your garments, models, or raw assets.

generate.desc: AI composes studio-quality scenes in minutes.

team.title: Two founders, one mission.
team.desc: Built by people who believe Moroccan fashion deserves the same creative infrastructure as the global luxury market.

amal.bio: Amal brings a deep understanding of fashion commerce and brand identity to Anaqio. Her vision for what AI can unlock for Moroccan fashion brands is at the heart of the product.

mo.bio: Mohamed is a full-stack developer and experience designer with 9+ years building intuitive digital products. He shapes the engineering and design direction from Bouskoura, Morocco.

subheadline.a: Transform garments into photorealistic campaign visuals in minutes.
subheadline.b: Anaqio optimizes fashion art for scalable commerce.

supportLine.post: who need consistent, brand-safe visuals at scale.

intro.a: Fashion brands today need an enormous volume of visuals.
intro.b: But traditional production wasn't built for this speed.
intro.detail: Photoshoots require studios, models, logistics, and post-production — making them expensive, slow, and difficult to scale. For emerging designers and growing brands, this creates a bottleneck between creative vision and commercial growth.
intro.quote: Fashion is art. Commerce requires optimization.

solution.description: Anaqio transforms simple garment images into photorealistic visuals using a structured AI pipeline built specifically for fashion brands.
solution.footer: No photoshoot. No production delays. Just scalable visual generation.

pipeline.label: Flat Lay
pipeline.body: Upload your raw garment imagery and brand assets to begin.

pipeline.label: AI Pipeline
pipeline.body: We orchestrate your asset generation using bleeding-edge pipelines.

pipeline.label: Campaign Visual
pipeline.body: Receive photorealistic campaign visuals ready for commerce.

steps.title: Upload Your Garment
steps.body: Upload a flat lay or ghost mannequin image.

steps.title: Define the Visual Style
steps.body: Choose poses, lighting, and environments designed for fashion campaigns.

steps.title: Generate Photorealistic Output
steps.body: Our AI pipeline transforms the garment into high-quality visuals ready for e-commerce, campaigns, and social media.

steps.title: Scale Instantly
steps.body: Generate multiple variations for different markets, campaigns, or product launches. Minutes — not weeks.

whyAnaqio.footer: Anaqio is built for reliability, consistency, and scale.

points.title: Garment Precision
points.body: Faithful reproduction of textures, cuts, colors, and brand details.

points.title: Lighting Consistency
points.body: Uniform lighting that preserves accurate color representation.

points.title: Scalable Production
points.body: Generate hundreds of visuals without increasing production costs.

points.title: Brand-Safe Outputs
points.body: Structured AI pipelines designed for fashion brands — not experimental image generation.

whoItsFor.footer: Anyone producing fashion visuals at scale.

audiences.title: Fashion Brands
audiences.body: Scale product visuals for e-commerce and marketing campaigns.

audiences.title: Emerging Designers
audiences.body: Create professional visuals without expensive photoshoots.

audiences.title: Marketplaces
audiences.body: Standardize visual quality across large product inventories.

vision.intro: The fashion industry is entering a new era where visual production must keep pace with digital commerce.
vision.quote: Anaqio's vision is to become the visual infrastructure layer of the global fashion industry, transforming visual production from a bottleneck into a growth engine.

philosophy.body: Fashion has always been a form of artistic expression. Technology should not replace creativity — it should empower it. Anaqio was built with a simple belief: AI should optimize the operational side of fashion production so designers and brands can focus on creativity and storytelling. We are not replacing fashion art. We are building the infrastructure that allows it to scale.
